          "example_title": "Sketching the Graph of a Vertically Reflected Function",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:29:35.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:29 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 31400,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:31",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The function $y=f(x)$ is shown above. Which of the following gives the plot of $y=-f(x)?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The function $y=f(x)$ is shown above. Which of the following gives the plot of $y=-f(x)?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>To obtain the graph of $y=-f(x)$ from $y=f(x),$ we need to reflect the graph over the $x$ axis. The resulting graph is shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-12740-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-12740-e-0\" /></div>",
          "explanation_text": "To obtain the graph of $y=-f(x)$ from $y=f(x),$ we need to reflect the graph over the $x$ axis. The resulting graph is shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-12740-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,

            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-12740-a-3\" />",
              "text": ""

            {
              "number": 4,

          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-12740-a-1\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],

          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 476037,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -2.5,\nxmax = 4.5,\nymin = -3,\nymax = 2,\nxtick = {2},\nytick = {-1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-1)*-12pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)* 4pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{black};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-3:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=\\lcolor,\nline width=1pt,\n]{5/10*x-1};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:2,0) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-1,0) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740"
            },
            {
              "id": 476038,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -2.5,\nxmax = 4.5,\nymin = -2,\nymax = 3,\nxtick = {2},\nytick = {1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-1)*-12pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)*-2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{black};\n\\def\\lcolor{red};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-3:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=\\lcolor,\nline width=1pt,\n]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:2,0) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-1,0) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,1) {};\n\n\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 476039,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -2.5,\nxmax = 4.5,\nymin = -2.5,\nymax = 2.5,\nxtick = {2},\nytick = {1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-1)*-12pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)* -2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\lcolor,line width=1pt,]{5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\rcolor,line width=1pt,]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-3:2,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{-5/10*x+1};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=2:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot[domain=-3:5, samples=200, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{(5/10*x-1)};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:2,0) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,1) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 476040,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -4.5,\nxmax = 2.5,\nymin = -3,\nymax = 2,\nxtick = {-2},\nytick = {-1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-2)* 0pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)*-2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*-2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\lcolor,line width=1pt,]{5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\rcolor,line width=1pt,]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-5:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{-5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot[domain=-3:5, samples=200, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{(5/10*x-1)};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-2,0) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 476041,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -2.5,\nxmax = 4.5,\nymin = -1,\nymax = 4,\nxtick = {10},\nytick = {2}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-2)* 0pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 2)* 2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*-2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\lcolor,line width=1pt,]{5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\rcolor,line width=1pt,]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-3:2,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{5/10*x+2};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=2:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{-5/10*x+4};\n\n%\\addplot[domain=-3:5, samples=200, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{(5/10*x-1)};\n\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-2,0) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,2) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 476042,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3.5,\nxmax = 3.5,\nymin = -1.5,\nymax = 3.5,\nxtick = {-2},\nytick = {1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-2)* 0pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)* 2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*-2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\lcolor,line width=1pt,]{5/10*x-1};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\rcolor,line width=1pt,]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\addplot [\ndomain=-5:5,\nsamples=200,\ncolor=red,\nline width=1pt,\n]{5/10*x+1};\n\n%\\addplot[domain=-3:5, samples=200, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{(5/10*x-1)};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-2,0) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,1) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740-a-5"

            {
              "id": 476043,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -2.5,\nxmax = 4.5,\nymin = -2.5,\nymax = 2.5,\nxtick = {2},\nytick = {-1,1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick==-1)*-12pt}},\nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 2)* 0pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick== 1)* -2pt}},\ny tick label style={yshift={(\\tick==-1)*2pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\\def\\rcolor{black};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n%\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\lcolor,line width=1pt,]{5/10*x-1};\n\n\\addplot [domain=-3:5,samples=200,color=\\rcolor,line width=1pt,]{1-5/10*x};\n\n\\addplot[domain=-3:5, samples=200, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{(5/10*x-1)};\n\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:2,0) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\rcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,1) {};\n%\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-4) {};\n\\node[circle,color=\\lcolor,fill=\\lcolor,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-12740-e-0"

          "format": "MC",

          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:29:56.000Z",

          "time_elapsed_ms": 13989,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:14",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The function $y = f(x)$ is shown above. Which of the following gives the plot of $y=-f(x)?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The function $y = f(x)$ is shown above. Which of the following gives the plot of $y=-f(x)?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>To obtain the graph of $y=−f(x)$ from $y=f(x)$, we need to reflect the graph over the $x$-axis. The resulting graph is shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-16697-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-16697-e-0\" /></div>",
          "explanation_text": "To obtain the graph of $y=−f(x)$ from $y=f(x)$, we need to reflect the graph over the $x$-axis. The resulting graph is shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [

              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-16697-a-1\" />",

            "selected_choice": 1,

          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 476093,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows}\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections}\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntrig format plots=rad,\nlegend pos=outer north east,\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\naxis equal,\n%grid = both,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -2,\nymax = 4,\nxtick = {0},\nytick = {0},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above right},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1.02)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1.02)},\n\tanchor=south,\n}\n]\n\n% Graphics\n\\addplot [domain=-3:0,samples=100,color=blue,line width=1pt]{x^2};\n\\addplot [domain=0:3,samples=100,color=blue,line width=1pt]{x};\n\n% Label\n\\node[label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(1,1)$}}},circle,fill, blue, inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:1,1) {};\n\n\\end{axis}\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697"
            },
            {
              "id": 476094,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -4,\nymax = 2,\nxtick = {0},\nytick = {0}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:0, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-x^2};\n\\addplot[domain= 0:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-x};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt,label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(1,-1)$}}}] at (axis cs:1,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 476095,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -2,\nymax = 4,\nxtick = {1},\nytick = {0}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:1, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{(x-1)^2};\n\\addplot[domain= 1:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{(x-1)};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt,label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(2,-1)$}}}] at (axis cs:2,1) {};\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt ] at (axis cs:1,0) {};\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 476096,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -4,\nymax = 2,\nxtick = {1},\nytick = {0}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:1, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-(x-1)^2};\n\\addplot[domain= 1:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-(x-1)};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt,label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(2,-1)$}}}] at (axis cs:2,-1) {};\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:1,0) {};\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-a-3"
            },
            {
              "id": 476097,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -2,\nymax = 4,\nxtick = {-1},\nytick = {1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:-1, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{(x+1)^2};\n\\addplot[domain= -1:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{(x+1)};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,1) {};\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-1,0) {};\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 476098,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -4,\nymax = 2,\nxtick = {-1},\nytick = {-1}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{red};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:-1, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-(x+1)^2};\n\\addplot[domain= -1:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-(x+1)};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:0,-1) {};\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt] at (axis cs:-1,0) {};\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-a-5"
            },
            {
              "id": 476099,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{hyperref}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usepackage{cancel}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\t\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}[\ntick label style={font=\\footnotesize},\nlabel style={font=\\small},\nlegend pos=outer north east,\nlegend style={font=\\footnotesize},\ntrig format plots=rad,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\naxis y line = center,\naxis x line = middle,\n%axis equal,\nxmin = -3,\nxmax = 3,\nymin = -3,\nymax = 3,\nxtick = {0},\nytick = {0}, \nx tick label style={xshift={(\\tick== 3)* 8pt}},\nxlabel = $x$,\nylabel = {$y$},\nxlabel style={below right},\nylabel style={above left},\nevery axis x label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=west,\n},\nevery axis y label/.style={\n\tat={(ticklabel* cs:1)},\n\tanchor=south,\n},\n%clip=false\n]\n\n\n\n\\def\\rcolor{black};\n\\def\\lcolor{blue};\n\n\n\\addplot[domain=-5:0, samples=100, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{x^2};\n\\addplot[domain= 0:5, samples=100, color=\\lcolor, dashed, opacity=0.5, line width=1pt, smooth]{x};\n\\addplot[domain=-5:0, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-x^2};\n\\addplot[domain= 0:5, samples=400, color=\\rcolor, line width=1pt]{-x};\n\n\n\\node[circle,\\lcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt,label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(1,1)$}}}] at (axis cs:1,1) {};\n\\node[circle,\\rcolor,fill,inner sep=1.5pt,label={0:{\\footnotesize{$(1,-1)$}}}] at (axis cs:1,-1) {};\n\n\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-16697-e-0"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12859835,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 3,
          "question_id": 113813,
          "task_id": 2828271,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1150,
          "topic_name": "Vertical Reflections of Functions",
          "example_id": 4978,
          "example_title": "Identifying a Point on a Vertically Reflected Function",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:30:52.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:30 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 25018,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:25",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The point $P$ with coordinates $(8,-6)$ lies on the curve $y = f(x).$ Which point must lie on $y = -f(x)?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The point $P$ with coordinates $(8,-6)$ lies on the curve $y = f(x).$ Which point must lie on $y = -f(x)?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>The transformation $y=-f(x)$ reflects the curve $y=f(x)$ in the $x$-axis.</p>\n<p>First, notice that the point $P(8,-6)$ lies $6$ units <em>below</em> the $x$-axis. So, under the action of the transformation, this point will be reflected $6$ units <em>above</em> the $x$-axis.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-113813-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-113813-e-0\" /></div>\n\n<p>We conclude that the point $(8, 6)$ must lie on the graph of $y=-f(x).$</p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "The transformation $y=-f(x)$ reflects the curve $y=f(x)$ in the $x$-axis.\nFirst, notice that the point $P(8,-6)$ lies $6$ units below the $x$-axis. So, under the action of the transformation, this point will be reflected $6$ units above the $x$-axis.\nWe conclude that the point $(8, 6)$ must lie on the graph of $y=-f(x).$",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "$(8, 6)$",
              "text": "$(8, 6)$"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "$(8, -6)$",
              "text": "$(8, -6)$"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "$(-8, 6)$",
              "text": "$(-8, 6)$"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "$(-8, -6)$",
              "text": "$(-8, -6)$"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "$(6, 8)$",
              "text": "$(6, 8)$"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "$(8, 6)$",
            "text": "$(8, 6)$",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 476172,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{document}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}\n[\naxis lines=middle,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\n  xmin=-9.5,\n  xmax=9.5,\n  ymin=-9.5,\n  ymax=9.5,\n  xlabel=$x$,\n  ylabel=$y$,\nxtick={\\empty},\nytick={\\empty},\nxlabel style={right},\nylabel style={above},\naxis equal \n]  \n\n\\def\\myx{8}\n\\def\\myy{-6}\n\\def\\shift{10}\n\n\\pgfmathtruncatemacro{\\mynewy}{(-1)*\\myy}\n\n% P\n\\plot[domain={\\myx-2}:{\\myx+2}, samples=100, color=red, line width=0.6pt, smooth, dotted, opacity=0.75] {0.1*(x-\\myx)^3+\\myy};\n\\filldraw[draw=none,red] (axis cs:\\myx,\\myy) circle (2pt) node[below, xshift=\\shift pt, font=\\small, color=black] {$P(\\myx,\\myy)$};\n%\\node[left, red] at (axis cs:-1.5,-1) {$y=f(x)$};\n\n% P'\n\\plot[domain={\\myx-2}:{\\myx+2}, samples=100, color=blue, line width=0.6pt, smooth, dotted, opacity=0.75] {-0.1*(x-\\myx)^3+\\mynewy};\n\\filldraw[draw=none,blue] (axis cs:\\myx,\\mynewy) circle (2pt) node[above, xshift=\\shift pt, font=\\small, color=black] {$P'(\\myx,\\mynewy)$};\n%\\node[left, blue] at (axis cs:-1.5,1) {$y=-f(x)$};\n\n% Arrow\n\\draw[-stealth, blue, shorten > = 3pt, shorten <    = 3pt] (axis cs:\\myx,\\myy) -- (axis cs:\\myx,\\mynewy) node[midway, left, pos=0.5] {};\n\t\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-113813-e-0"
            }
          ],

          "format": "MC",

          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:31 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 7652,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:08",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The point $P$ with coordinates $(3,-1)$ lies on the curve $y = f(x).$ Which point must lie on $y = -f(x)?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The point $P$ with coordinates $(3,-1)$ lies on the curve $y = f(x).$ Which point must lie on $y = -f(x)?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>The transformation $y=-f(x)$ reflects the curve $y=f(x)$ in the $x$-axis.</p>\n<p>First, notice that the point $P(3,-1)$ lies $1$ unit <em>below</em> the $x$-axis. So, under the action of the transformation, this point will be reflected $1$ unit <em>above</em> the $x$-axis.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-75894-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-75894-e-0\" /></div>\n\n<p>We conclude that the point $(3, 1)$ must lie on the graph of $y=-f(x).$</p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "The transformation $y=-f(x)$ reflects the curve $y=f(x)$ in the $x$-axis.\nFirst, notice that the point $P(3,-1)$ lies $1$ unit below the $x$-axis. So, under the action of the transformation, this point will be reflected $1$ unit above the $x$-axis.\nWe conclude that the point $(3, 1)$ must lie on the graph of $y=-f(x).$",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "$(3, 1)$",

            },

          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 476124,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{document}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\\begin{axis}\n[\naxis lines=middle,\ntick style={draw=none},\naxis line style = thick,\n  xmin=-0.5,\n  xmax=4.5,\n  ymin=-2.5,\n  ymax=2.5,\n  xlabel=$x$,\n  ylabel=$y$,\nxtick={\\empty},\nytick={\\empty},\nxlabel style={right},\nylabel style={above},\naxis equal \n]  \n\n\\plot[domain=2:4, samples=100, color=red, line width=0.6pt, smooth, dotted, opacity=0.75] {0.05*(x-3)^3-1};\n\\filldraw[draw=none,red] (axis cs:3,-1) circle (2pt) node[below, font=\\small, color=black] {$P(3,-1)$};\n%\\node[left, red] at (axis cs:-1.5,-1) {$y=f(x)$};\n\n\\plot[domain=2:4, samples=100, color=blue, line width=0.6pt, smooth, dotted, opacity=0.75] {-0.05*(x-3)^3+1};\n\\filldraw[draw=none,blue] (axis cs:3,1) circle (2pt) node[above, font=\\small, color=black] {$P'(3,1)$};\n%\\node[left, blue] at (axis cs:-1.5,1) {$y=-f(x)$};\n\n\\draw[-stealth, blue, shorten > = 3pt, shorten <    = 3pt] (axis cs:3,-1) -- (axis cs:3,1) node[midway, left, pos=0.5] {};\n\t\n\\end{axis}\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-75894-e-0"

    {
      "task_id": 2828473,
      "task_type": "Lesson",
      "topic_id": 1102,
      "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
      "course_id": null,

      "completed_at": "2025-01-12T19:25:48.000Z",

      "started_at": "2025-01-12T19:16:43.000Z",
      "points_possible": 8,
      "points_awarded": 8,
      "progress": 1,
      "progress_display": "100%",
      "review_url": "/learn?taskId=2828473",

      "prerequisites": [
        {
          "id": 1100,
          "name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "url_slug": null,

      ],
      "question_count": 8,
      "questions": [
        {
          "number": 1,
          "question_id": 11323,
          "task_id": 2828473,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1102,
          "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
          "example_id": 9934,
          "example_title": "Expressing a Vector as a Sum or Difference of Two Known Vectors",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "M",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyModerate",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:18:21.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:18 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 38769,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:39",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{YX}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{XV}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{VZ}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{YW}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{XW}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{YX}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{XV}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{VZ}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{YW}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{XW}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We want to find a &quot;path&quot; from $X$ to $W$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b, \\mathbf c,$ and $\\mathbf d.$  </p>\n<p>According to the triangle law of addition,\n\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{XW}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{XY}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}},      \n\\]</p>\n<p>as shown below. </p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-11323-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-11323-e-0\" /></div> \n\n<p>Now, from the original diagram, we have that</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{XY}} = -\\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}} = \\mathbf{d}.  \n\\]</p>\n<p>Let&#39;s add these to our diagram.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-11323-e-1\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-11323-e-1\" /></div> \n\n\n<p>Therefore, we obtain</p>\n<p>\\begin{align*}\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{XW}}} &= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{XY}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}}\\\\[5pt]\n&= -\\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{d} \\\\[5pt]\n&=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}.\n\\end{align*}  </p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "We want to find a \"path\" from $X$ to $W$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b, \\mathbf c,$ and $\\mathbf d.$\nAccording to the triangle law of addition,\n\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{XW}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{XY}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}},\n\\]\nas shown below.\nNow, from the original diagram, we have that\n\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{XY}} = -\\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}} = \\mathbf{d}.\n\\]\nLet's add these to our diagram.\nTherefore, we obtain\n\\begin{align*}\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{XW}}} &= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{XY}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{YW}}}\\\\[5pt]\n&= -\\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{d} \\\\[5pt]\n&=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}.\n\\end{align*}",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}$",
              "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{a}$",
              "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{a}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{a-b-c}$",
              "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{a-b-c}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}+\\mathbf{a}$",
              "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}+\\mathbf{a}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{a+b-c}$",
              "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{a+b-c}$"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}$",
            "text": "$ \\overrightarrow{XW}=\\mathbf{d}-\\mathbf{a}$",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 440551,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (Y) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (W) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (X) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Z) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (V) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$Y$}] (Y) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$Z$}] (Z) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$X$}] (X) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$V$}] (V) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$W$}] (W) at (3.5, 4);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick,] (W) -- (Y) node[midway,below right]{$\\mathbf{d}$ };\n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick] (V) -- (Z) node[midway,above left]{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n    \\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick] (X) -- (Y) node[midway,above left]{$\\mathbf{a}$ };\n     \\draw[black, very thick] (Z) -- (Y);\n     \\draw[black,directed, very thick] (X) -- (V) node[midway ,below left]{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11323"
            },
            {
              "id": 440552,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article} \n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (Y) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (W) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (X) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Z) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (V) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$Y$}] (Y) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$Z$}] (Z) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$X$}] (X) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$V$}] (V) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$W$}] (W) at (3.5, 4);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[blue,  directed, very thick,] (Y) -- (W) \nnode[midway,below right]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{d}$ };   \n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (V) -- (Z) node[midway,above left]{}; \n\n%{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n    \\draw[blue,   directed, very thick] (X) -- (Y) node[midway,above left]{};  \n%{$\\mathbf{a}$ };     \n\\draw[red, directed, very thick] (X) -- (W) node[midway,above left]{$$ };\n     \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (Z) -- (Y);\n     \\draw[black,directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (X) -- (V) node[midway ,below left]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ }; \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11323-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 440553,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article} \n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (Y) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (W) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (X) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Z) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (V) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$Y$}] (Y) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$Z$}] (Z) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$X$}] (X) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$V$}] (V) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$W$}] (W) at (3.5, 4);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[blue,  directed, very thick,] (Y) -- (W) \nnode[midway,below right]{$\\mathbf{d}$ };    \n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (V) -- (Z) node[midway,above left]{}; \n\n%{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n    \\draw[blue,   directed, very thick] (X) -- (Y) node[midway,above left] \n{$-\\mathbf{a}$ };     \n\\draw[red, directed, very thick] (X) -- (W) node[midway,above left]{$$ };\n     \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (Z) -- (Y);\n     \\draw[black,directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (X) -- (V) node[midway ,below left]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ }; \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture} \n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11323-e-1"
            }

        {
          "number": 2,
          "question_id": 69510,
          "task_id": 2828473,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1102,
          "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
          "example_id": 9934,
          "example_title": "Expressing a Vector as a Sum or Difference of Two Known Vectors",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:18:47.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:18 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 22336,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:22",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{PS}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{SQ}=\\mathbf{b},$ and $\\overrightarrow{PT}=\\mathbf{c}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{PQ}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}.$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{PS}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{SQ}=\\mathbf{b},$ and $\\overrightarrow{PT}=\\mathbf{c}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{PQ}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We want to find a &quot;path&quot; from $P$ to $Q$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b,$ and $\\mathbf c.$</p>\n<p>According to the triangle law of addition,</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{PQ}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{PS}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{SQ}}} \n\\]</p>\n<p>as shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-69510-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-69510-e-0\" /></div>\n\n<p>Now, from the original diagram, we have that</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{PS}} = \\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{SQ}} = \\mathbf{b}.\n\\]</p>\n<p>Let&#39;s add these to our diagram.</p>\n <div id=\"graphic-q-69510-e-1\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-69510-e-1\" /></div>\n\n<p>Therefore, we obtain</p>\n<p>\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{PQ} \n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{PS}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{SQ}}}  \\\\[5pt]\n&=\\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}\n\\end{align*}  </p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "We want to find a \"path\" from $P$ to $Q$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b,$ and $\\mathbf c.$\nAccording to the triangle law of addition,\n\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{PQ}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{PS}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{SQ}}}\n\\]\nas shown below.\nNow, from the original diagram, we have that\n\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{PS}} = \\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{SQ}} = \\mathbf{b}.\n\\]\nLet's add these to our diagram.\nTherefore, we obtain\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{PQ}\n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{PS}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{SQ}}} \\\\[5pt]\n&=\\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}\n\\end{align*}",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": " $\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "  $\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{a}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{a}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "  $\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{c}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{c}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "  $\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{b}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{b}$"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {

            "html": " $\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}$",
            "text": "$\\overrightarrow{PQ}= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}$",

          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 440593,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\usepackage{tikz, tkz-euclide}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n% label coordinates\n\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (0, 0);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$Q$}] (Q) at (7, 1.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$S$}] (S) at (4, 4);\n \\coordinate [label={above right :$T$}] (T) at (3, 2);\n\n% rays\n\\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick,] (T) -- (P) node[midway,below=0.1cm]{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, black,  directed]  (P) -- (S) node[midway, above=0.1cm]{ $\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[very thick, black,   directed]  (S) -- (Q) node[ ,midway,above right=0.1cm]{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, black]  (P) -- (Q); \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69510"

            {
              "id": 440594,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\usepackage{tikz, tkz-euclide}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n% label coordinates\n\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (0, 0);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$Q$}] (Q) at (7, 1.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$S$}] (S) at (4, 4);\n \\coordinate [label={above right :$T$}] (T) at (3, 2);\n\n% rays\n\\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (P) node[midway,below=0.1cm]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, blue,  directed]  (P) -- (S) node[midway, above=0.1cm]\n{};\n%{ $\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[very thick, blue,   directed]  (S) -- (Q) node[ ,midway,above right=0.1cm]\n{};\n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, red, directed]  (P) -- (Q);  \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69510-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 440595,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\usepackage{tikz, tkz-euclide}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n% label coordinates\n\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (0, 0);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$Q$}] (Q) at (7, 1.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$S$}] (S) at (4, 4);\n \\coordinate [label={above right :$T$}] (T) at (3, 2);\n\n% rays\n\\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (P) node[midway,below=0.1cm]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, blue,  directed]  (P) -- (S) node[midway, above=0.1cm]\n{ $\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[very thick, blue,   directed]  (S) -- (Q) node[ ,midway,above right=0.1cm]\n{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n\\draw[very thick, red,directed]  (P) -- (Q);   \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69510-e-1"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12859315,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }

        {
          "number": 3,
          "question_id": 143000,
          "task_id": 2828473,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1102,
          "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
          "example_id": 4277,
          "example_title": "Expressing a Vector as a Sum or Difference of More Than Two Known Vectors",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "M",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyModerate",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:19:31.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:19 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 21238,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:21",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{RQ}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{SQ}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{RT}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{TP}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$ </p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{RQ}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{SQ}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{RT}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{TP}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We want to find a &quot;path&quot; from $T$ to $P$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$ </p>\n<p>According to the triangle law of addition,</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{TP}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RQ}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}}  \n\\] </p>\n<p>as shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-143000-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-143000-e-0\" /></div> \n\n<p>Now, from the original diagram, we have that</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{TR}} = -\\mathbf{d}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{RQ}} = \\mathbf{b}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{QP}} = \\mathbf{a}.  \n\\]</p>\n<p>Let&#39;s add these to our diagram. </p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-143000-e-1\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-143000-e-1\" /></div> \n\n<p>Therefore, we obtain</p>\n<p>\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{TP} \n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RQ}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}}  \\\\[5pt] \n&= -\\mathbf{d}+\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{a} \\\\[5pt]\n&= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}. \n\\end{align*}</p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "We want to find a \"path\" from $T$ to $P$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$\nAccording to the triangle law of addition,\n\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{TP}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RQ}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}}\n\\]\nas shown below.\nNow, from the original diagram, we have that\n\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{TR}} = -\\mathbf{d}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{RQ}} = \\mathbf{b}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{QP}} = \\mathbf{a}.\n\\]\nLet's add these to our diagram.\nTherefore, we obtain\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{TP}\n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RQ}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}} \\\\[5pt]\n&= -\\mathbf{d}+\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{a} \\\\[5pt]\n&= \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}.\n\\end{align*}",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}- \\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{d}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}- \\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{d}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{d}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{c}-\\mathbf{d}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{c}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{c}$"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{c}+\\mathbf{d}$",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{c}+\\mathbf{d}$"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}$",
            "text": "$\\overrightarrow{TP} = \\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}-\\mathbf{d}$",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 440692,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (P) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (T) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Q) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (R) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (S) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$T$}] (T) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$R$}] (R) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below right :$S$}] (S) at (3, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, very thick] (T) -- (P);\n    \\draw[black,reverse directed, very thick] (T) -- (R) node[midway,above left]{$\\mathbf{d}$ };\n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick] (Q) -- (P) node[midway,above left]{$\\mathbf{a}$ };\n    \\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick] (Q) -- (R) node[ midway ,above right]{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n    \\draw[black, very thick] (S) -- (R);\n     \\draw[black, very thick] (S) -- (P);\n     \\draw[black,reverse directed, very thick] (Q) -- (S) node[midway ,below right]{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n \\draw[black, very thick] (S) -- (T);\n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-143000"
            },
            {
              "id": 440693,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (P) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (T) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Q) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (R) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (S) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$T$}] (T) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$R$}] (R) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below right :$S$}] (S) at (3, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (S);\n    \\draw[blue, directed, very thick] (T) -- (R) node[midway,above left]{}; \n%{$\\mathbf{d}$ };  \n    \\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (Q) -- (S) node[midway,above left]{}; \n%{$\\mathbf{a}$ };\n    \\draw[blue, reverse directed, very thick] (Q) -- (R) node[ midway ,above right]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ }; \n    \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (R);\n     \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (P);\n     \\draw[blue,directed, very thick ] (Q) -- (P) node[midway ,below right]{};\n%{$\\mathbf{c}$ }; \n \\draw[red, reverse directed, very thick] (P) -- (T);    \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-143000-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 440694,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \\coordinate (P) at (1,3.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (T) at (3,0.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (Q) at (4,5.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (R) at (9,2.5) ;\n    \\coordinate (S) at (3,3) ;\n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$T$}] (T) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$R$}] (R) at (9, 2.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below right :$S$}] (S) at (3, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (S);\n    \\draw[blue, directed, very thick] (T) -- (R) node[midway,above left]{$-\\mathbf{d}$ }; \n    \\draw[black, reverse directed, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (Q) -- (S) node[midway,above left]{}; \n%{$\\mathbf{a}$ };\n    \\draw[blue, reverse directed, very thick] (Q) -- (R) node[ midway ,above right]{$\\mathbf{b}$ }; \n    \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (R);\n     \\draw[black, very thick, opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (P);\n     \\draw[blue,directed, very thick ] (Q) -- (P) node[midway ,below right]{$\\mathbf{a}$ }; \n \\draw[red, reverse directed, very thick] (P) -- (T);    \n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-143000-e-1"

        {
          "number": 4,
          "question_id": 141481,
          "task_id": 2828473,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1102,
          "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
          "example_id": 4277,
          "example_title": "Expressing a Vector as a Sum or Difference of More Than Two Known Vectors",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:20:01.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:20 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 25030,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:25",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{QT}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{RS}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{TR}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{RP}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{QP}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the diagram shown above, where $\\overrightarrow{QT}=\\mathbf{a},$ $\\overrightarrow{RS}=\\mathbf{b},$ $\\overrightarrow{TR}=\\mathbf{c},$ and $\\overrightarrow{RP}=\\mathbf{d}.$ Find $\\overrightarrow{QP}$ in terms of $\\mathbf{a},\\mathbf{b}, \\mathbf{c},$ and $\\mathbf{d}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We want to find a &quot;path&quot; from $Q$ to $P$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b, \\mathbf c,$ and $\\mathbf d.$</p>\n<p>According to the triangle law of addition,</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QT}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RP}}} \n\\]</p>\n<p>as shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-141481-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-141481-e-0\" /></div>  \n\n<p>Now, from the original diagram, we have that</p>\n<p>\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{QT}} = \\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{TR}} = \\mathbf{c}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{RP}} = \\mathbf{d}.\n\\]</p>\n<p>Let&#39;s add these to our diagram.</p>\n<p><div id=\"graphic-q-141481-e-1\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-141481-e-1\" /></div><br>Therefore, we obtain</p>\n<p>\\begin{align*}\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}} \n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QT}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RP}}} \\\\[5pt] \n&=\\mathbf a  +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d.\n\\end{align*}</p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "We want to find a \"path\" from $Q$ to $P$ consisting only of the vectors $\\mathbf a, \\mathbf b, \\mathbf c,$ and $\\mathbf d.$\nAccording to the triangle law of addition,\n\\[\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}} = {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QT}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RP}}}\n\\]\nas shown below.\nNow, from the original diagram, we have that\n\\[\n{\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{QT}} = \\mathbf{a}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{TR}} = \\mathbf{c}, \\qquad {\\color{blue}\\overrightarrow{RP}} = \\mathbf{d}.\n\\]\nLet's add these to our diagram.\nTherefore, we obtain\n\\begin{align*}\n{\\color{red}{\\overrightarrow{QP}}}\n&= {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{QT}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{TR}}} + {\\color{blue}{\\overrightarrow{RP}}} \\\\[5pt]\n&=\\mathbf a +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d.\n\\end{align*}",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a  +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$  ",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a  -\\mathbf b +\\mathbf d$  ",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a -\\mathbf b +\\mathbf d$"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b  +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$  ",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b  +\\mathbf c -\\mathbf d$  ",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b +\\mathbf c -\\mathbf d$"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b  -\\mathbf a +\\mathbf c$  ",
              "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf b -\\mathbf a +\\mathbf c$"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a  +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$  ",
            "text": "$\\overrightarrow{QP}=\\mathbf a +\\mathbf c +\\mathbf d$",
            "free_response": [],

          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 440659,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n    % define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (-1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$R$}] (R) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$S$}] (S) at (6, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above left, xshift=3pt, yshift=1pt :$T$}] (T) at (2.5, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black,very thick,] (T) -- (P)node[midway,above, yshift=1pt] {}; \n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick] (R) -- (S)node[midway,below right]{$\\mathbf{b}$ } ; \n    \\draw[black,  very thick] (Q) -- (P) node[midway,above left]{};\n     \\draw[black, very thick, directed] (R) -- (P)node[midway,below left]{$\\mathbf{d}$ }; \n     \\draw[black, very thick] (Q) -- (S) node[midway ,below]{ };\n    \\draw[black, very thick, directed] (T) -- (R) node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{c}$}; \n \\draw[black, very thick] (S) -- (T) ;\n \\draw[black, very thick, directed] (Q) -- (T)node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-141481"
            },
            {
              "id": 440660,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article} \n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n\t\tmark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n\t\tmark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\t\\pagestyle{empty}\n\t\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% define coordinates\n\t% define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (-1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$R$}] (R) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$S$}] (S) at (6, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above left, xshift=3pt, yshift=1pt :$T$}] (T) at (2.5, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (P); \n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (R) -- (S) node[midway,below right]{};  \n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ } ;\n    \\draw[red, directed, very thick] (Q) -- (P) node[midway,above left]{}; \n%{$\\mathbf{a}$ };\n     \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (R) -- (P)node[midway,below left]{};%{$\\mathbf{d}$ }; \n     \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (Q) -- (T) node[midway ,below]{ };\n    \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (T) -- (R)node[midway,right]{}; \n%{$\\mathbf{c}$}; \n \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (T) ;\n \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (Q) -- (S); \n\\end{tikzpicture} \n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-141481-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 440661,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article} \n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n\t\tmark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n\t\tmark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\t\\pagestyle{empty}\n\t\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% define coordinates\n\t% define coordinates\n    \\coordinate (O) at (0,0) ;\n    \n % label coordinates\n \\coordinate [label={left :$P$}] (P) at (-1, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={below :$R$}] (R) at (3, 0.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above :$Q$}] (Q) at (4, 5.5);\n \\coordinate [label={right :$S$}] (S) at (6, 3.5);\n \\coordinate [label={above left, xshift=3pt, yshift=1pt :$T$}] (T) at (2.5, 3);\n\n      % rays\n    \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (T) -- (P); \n    \\draw[black, directed, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (R) -- (S) node[midway,below right]{};  \n%{$\\mathbf{b}$ } ;\n    \\draw[red, directed, very thick] (Q) -- (P) node[midway,above left]{};\n     \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (R) -- (P)node[midway,below left]{$\\mathbf{d}$ }; \n     \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (Q) -- (T) node[midway ,right]{$\\mathbf{a}$  }; \n    \\draw[blue, very thick, directed] (T) -- (R)node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{c}$}; \n \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (S) -- (T) ;\n \\draw[black, very thick,opacity=0.25, dashed] (Q) -- (S); \n\\end{tikzpicture} \n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-141481-e-1"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12859363,

            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 5,
          "question_id": 69539,
          "task_id": 2828473,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1102,
          "topic_name": "Problem Solving Using Vector Diagrams",
          "example_id": 5015,
          "example_title": "Identifying Vector Equalities",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "M",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyModerate",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:21:49.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:21 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 56641,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:57",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>In figure $ABCD$ shown above, which of the following are equal to the vector $\\overrightarrow{DB}?$</p>\n<ol class=\"questionStatements\">\n<li>  $\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC}+\\overrightarrow{CB}$ </li>\n<li>  $\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AB}$ </li>\n<li>  $\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA}+\\overrightarrow{CD}$ </li>\n</ol>\n\n",
          "question_text": "In figure $ABCD$ shown above, which of the following are equal to the vector $\\overrightarrow{DB}?$\n$\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC}+\\overrightarrow{CB}$\n$\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AB}$\n$\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA}+\\overrightarrow{CD}$",
          "explanation_html": "<ul>\n<li><p>For the $1$st expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC}+\\overrightarrow{CB}\n&= (\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC})+\\overrightarrow{CB} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{DC}+\\overrightarrow{CB} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{DB}  \\quad {\\color{green}\\checkmark}\n\\end{align*}</p>\n</li>\n<li><p>For the $2$nd expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AB}\n&= \\overrightarrow{DB}  \\quad {\\color{green}\\checkmark}\n\\end{align*}</p>\n</li>\n<li><p>For the $3$rd expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA}+\\overrightarrow{CD}\n&= (\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA})+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= (\\overrightarrow{BA}+\\overrightarrow{AC})+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{BC}+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{BD} \\\\[3pt]\n&\\neq \\overrightarrow{DB} \\quad {\\color{red}\\times}\n\\end{align*}</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Therefore, the correct answer is &quot;I and II only&quot;.</p>\n",
          "explanation_text": "For the $1$st expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC}+\\overrightarrow{CB}\n&= (\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AC})+\\overrightarrow{CB} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{DC}+\\overrightarrow{CB} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{DB} \\quad {\\color{green}\\checkmark}\n\\end{align*}\nFor the $2$nd expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{DA}+\\overrightarrow{AB}\n&= \\overrightarrow{DB} \\quad {\\color{green}\\checkmark}\n\\end{align*}\nFor the $3$rd expression, we have:\n\\begin{align*}\n\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA}+\\overrightarrow{CD}\n&= (\\overrightarrow{BA}-\\overrightarrow{CA})+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= (\\overrightarrow{BA}+\\overrightarrow{AC})+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{BC}+\\overrightarrow{CD} \\\\[3pt]\n&= \\overrightarrow{BD} \\\\[3pt]\n&\\neq \\overrightarrow{DB} \\quad {\\color{red}\\times}\n\\end{align*}\nTherefore, the correct answer is \"I and II only\".",
          "free_answer_choice_html": null,
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "I and II only",
              "text": "I and II only"
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "I and III only",
              "text": "I and III only"
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "II and III only",
              "text": "II and III only"
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "I only",
              "text": "I only"
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "II only",
              "text": "II only"
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "I and II only",
            "text": "I and II only",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 440622,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows,shapes,positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\tikzstyle arrowstyle=[scale=1]\n\\tikzstyle directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrow[arrowstyle]{stealth}}}}]\n\\tikzstyle reverse directed=[postaction={decorate,decoration={markings,\n    mark=at position .50 with {\\arrowreversed[arrowstyle]{stealth};}}}]\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t% label coordinates\n\t\\coordinate [label={above :$A$}] (A) at (2, 4);\n\t\\coordinate [label={below left:$B$}] (B) at (0, 0);\n\t\\coordinate [label={above :$C$}] (C) at (2, 1);\n\t\\coordinate [label={below right:$D$}] (D) at (4, 0);\n\n\t% Figure\n\t\\draw[black, line width=1.2pt] \n\t\t(A) -- (B) -- (C) -- (D) -- cycle;\n%\t\\draw[->, blue, line width=1.2pt, opacity=0.4] \n\t\t(A) -- (E) ; \n\n\t\\draw[red, very thick,directed] (D) -- (B); node[midway,above=0.1cm]\n%\t\\draw[black, line width=1.2pt] \n\t\t(C) -- (E);\n   \n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69539"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {

            "select_id": null,
