            {
              "id": 226890,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-3,-3) grid (3,3.5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (-0.5,1)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (-2,1.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0.5,-1)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (-0.5,3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, below]{$\\textbf{a}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle, dashed] (0.5,-1) -- (2,0.5)\n\t\tnode[midway, below right=-2pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (B) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-2pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t\t% Resultant\n\t\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue] (A) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, right]{$\\mathbf{a}+\\mathbf{b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "0efce6b3d5621b6e5acf3fa6b34da5b6"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858102,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 2,
          "question_id": 118276,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4272,
          "example_title": "Adding Two Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "H",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyHard",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T18:54:23.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 6:54 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 60893,
          "time_elapsed_display": "1:01",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the diagram that shows the vector $\\mathbf{a}.$ Suppose we know that $\\mathbf{a}=\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}.$ Which of the following could be the vectors $\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the diagram that shows the vector $\\mathbf{a}.$ Suppose we know that $\\mathbf{a}=\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}.$ Which of the following could be the vectors $\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>First, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{c}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{b}.$ </p>\n<p>Now, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant \n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} = \\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}\n\\]\nis the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{b}$ to the head of $\\textbf{c}$, as shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-ff28c1048cc544a9cd937445961ceb24\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/ff28c1048cc544a9cd937445961ceb24\" /></div>",
          "explanation_text": "First, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{c}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{b}.$\nNow, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant\n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} = \\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}\n\\]\nis the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{b}$ to the head of $\\textbf{c}$, as shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-2\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-3\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-4\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-5\" />",
              "text": ""
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118276-a-1\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 226926,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (0,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (3,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (3,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (4,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (C) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, right]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\t% Resultant\n\t\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue] (A) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[sloped, midway, below=0pt]{$\\mathbf{a}=\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "ff28c1048cc544a9cd937445961ceb24"
            },
            {
              "id": 469592,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, deepskyblue, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (0,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (4,-3)  {};\n\t\t\n\t% Resultant\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, above right=-1pt]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276"
            },
            {
              "id": 469593,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (1,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-1pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (C) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 469594,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (1,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-1pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (D) -- (C)\n\t\tnode[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 469595,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (1,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (B) -- (A)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-1pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (C) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-a-3"
            },
            {
              "id": 469596,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (1,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (B) -- (A)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-1pt]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (D) -- (C)\n\t\tnode[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 469597,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-0.5,-2.5) grid (5.5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (2,1)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (5,3)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (0,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (5,-1)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left=-1pt]{$\\textbf{\\color{black}b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (C) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, above right]{$\\mathbf{\\color{black}c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-a-5"
            },
            {
              "id": 469598,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows, arrows.meta} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-4.5) grid (5,3);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (0,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (3,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (3,2)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (4,-3)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (A) -- (B)\n\t\tnode[midway, above left]{$\\textbf{b}$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 2\n\t\\draw[fixstyle] (C) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[midway, right]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\t% Resultant\n\t\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue] (A) -- (D)\n\t\tnode[sloped, midway, below=0pt]{$\\mathbf{a}=\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118276-e-0"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858156,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 3,
          "question_id": 69856,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4274,
          "example_title": "Adding Two Opposite Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T18:57:19.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 6:57 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 12324,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:12",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the vector $\\overrightarrow{CD},$ shown above. Which of the following could be $\\overrightarrow{CD}+\\overrightarrow{DC}?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the vector $\\overrightarrow{CD},$ shown above. Which of the following could be $\\overrightarrow{CD}+\\overrightarrow{DC}?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>According to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\overrightarrow{CD}$ to the head of $\\overrightarrow{DC}.$ Therefore, we obtain a new vector for which the tail and head is the same point, the tail of $\\overrightarrow{CD}.$ </p>\n<p>That vector is called the zero vector, and we write\n\\[\n\\overrightarrow{CD}+\\overrightarrow{DC} = \\mathbf{0}.\n\\]\nThe corresponding graph is shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-69856-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-e-0\" /></div>",
          "explanation_text": "According to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\overrightarrow{CD}$ to the head of $\\overrightarrow{DC}.$ Therefore, we obtain a new vector for which the tail and head is the same point, the tail of $\\overrightarrow{CD}.$\nThat vector is called the zero vector, and we write\n\\[\n\\overrightarrow{CD}+\\overrightarrow{DC} = \\mathbf{0}.\n\\]\nThe corresponding graph is shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-2\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-3\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-4\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-5\" />",
              "text": ""
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69856-a-1\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 469521,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (1,1.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (3,3.5)  {};\n      %  \\node[] at (1-0.2,1.5+0.2) {\\small $C$};\n   %     \\node[] at (3-0.2,3.5+0.2) {\\small $D$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, deepskyblue, arrows={-latex}] (D) -- (C);\n%\t\tnode[midway, above left] {$\\color{black}\\overrightarrow{DC}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 469525,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate[label={below,yshift=-1pt:$\\mathbf{0}$}] (A) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\node[circle, draw=deepskyblue, fill=deepskyblue, inner sep=1.5pt] at (A) {};\n\t%, label={$\\color{black}\\mathbf{0}$}\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 469524,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (3,1.5)  {};\n      %  \\node[] at (1-0.2,3.5-0.2) {\\small $C$};\n   %     \\node[] at (3-0.2,1.5-0.2) {\\small $D$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, deepskyblue, arrows={-latex}] (D) -- (C);\n%\t\tnode[midway, above right] {$\\color{black}\\overrightarrow{DC}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-a-5"
            },
            {
              "id": 469523,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (1,1.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (3,3.5)  {};\n      %  \\node[] at (1-0.2,1.5+0.2) {\\small $C$};\n   %     \\node[] at (3-0.2,3.5+0.2) {\\small $D$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, deepskyblue, arrows={-latex}] (C) -- (D);\n%\t\tnode[midway,above left] {$\\color{black}\\overrightarrow{CD}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 469522,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (3,1.5)  {};\n   %     \\node[] at (1-0.2,3.5-0.2) {\\small $C$};\n%        \\node[] at (3-0.2,1.5-0.2) {\\small $D$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, deepskyblue, arrows={-latex}] (C) -- (D);\n%\t\tnode[midway, above right] {$\\color{black}\\overrightarrow{CD}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-a-3"
            },
            {
              "id": 469520,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate[label={below,yshift=-1pt:$\\mathbf{0}$}] (A) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\node[circle, draw=deepskyblue, fill=deepskyblue, inner sep=1.5pt] at (A) {};\n\t%, label={$\\color{black}\\mathbf{0}$}\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 469519,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (C) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (D) at (3,1.5)  {};\n        \\node[] at (1-0.2,3.5-0.2) {\\small $C$};\n        \\node[] at (3-0.2,1.5-0.2) {\\small $D$};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, black, arrows={-latex}] (C) -- (D) \n\t\tnode[midway, above right] {$\\color{black}\\overrightarrow{CD}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69856"
            },
            {
              "id": 248034,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate[label={below,yshift=-1pt:$\\mathbf{0}$}] (A) at (1,3.5)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\node[circle, draw=deepskyblue, fill=deepskyblue, inner sep=1.5pt] at (A) {};\n\t%, label={$\\color{black}\\mathbf{0}$}\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "482ceac71a510002aae57ba4728c8cf9"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858281,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"

        },
        {
          "number": 4,
          "question_id": 69853,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4274,
          "example_title": "Adding Two Opposite Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "E",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyEasy",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T18:57:40.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 6:57 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 18989,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:19",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>Consider the vector $\\mathbf{c},$ shown above. Which of the following could be $\\mathbf{c}+(-\\mathbf{c})?$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "Consider the vector $\\mathbf{c},$ shown above. Which of the following could be $\\mathbf{c}+(-\\mathbf{c})?$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>According to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\mathbf{c}$ to the head of $-\\mathbf{c}.$ </p>\n<p>Therefore, we obtain a new vector for which the tail and head is the same point, the tail of $\\mathbf{c}.$ </p>\n<p>That vector is called the zero vector, and we write\n\\[\n\\mathbf{c}+(-\\mathbf{c}) = \\mathbf{0}.\n\\]\nThe corresponding graph is shown below.</p>\n<div id=\"graphic-5aacb55d5fff94cbff434f5b3605fecb\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/5aacb55d5fff94cbff434f5b3605fecb\" /></div>\n",
          "explanation_text": "According to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\mathbf{c}$ to the head of $-\\mathbf{c}.$\nTherefore, we obtain a new vector for which the tail and head is the same point, the tail of $\\mathbf{c}.$\nThat vector is called the zero vector, and we write\n\\[\n\\mathbf{c}+(-\\mathbf{c}) = \\mathbf{0}.\n\\]\nThe corresponding graph is shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-69853-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },

            {
              "id": 469514,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,3.5)  {};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, deepskyblue, arrows={-latex}] (A) -- (B);\n%\t\tnode[midway, below right] {$\\color{black}\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469513,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usepackage{amsmath}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!20, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\t\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\node[circle, draw=deepskyblue, fill=deepskyblue, inner sep=1.5pt, label={$\\color{black}\\mathbf{0}$}] at (A) {};\n\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469512,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{arrows} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usetikzlibrary{intersections} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween} %% Can be useful, not essential\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty} %% IMPORTANT\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}\n\t\n\t% Grid\n\t\\begin{scope}\n\t\t\\draw [black!30, step=0.5] (-1,-1) grid (5,5);\n\t\\end{scope}\n\n\t\\coordinate (A) at (1,0)  {};\n\t\\coordinate (B) at (4,3.5)  {};\n\t\n\t% Vector 1\n\t\\draw[->, line width=1.2pt, black, arrows={-latex}] (A) -- (B) \n\t\tnode[midway, below right] {$\\color{black}\\mathbf{c}$};\n\t\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-69853"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858294,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 5,
          "question_id": 11749,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4359,
          "example_title": "Subtracting Two Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "H",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyHard",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T18:59:30.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 6:59 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 31497,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:31",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The vectors $\\textbf{b}$ and $\\textbf{c}$ are shown in the diagram above. Which of the following could be $\\mathbf{-b+c}.$ </p>\n",
          "question_text": "The vectors $\\textbf{b}$ and $\\textbf{c}$ are shown in the diagram above. Which of the following could be $\\mathbf{-b+c}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We interpret  $-\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}$ as the addition\n\\[\n(-\\mathbf{b})+\\mathbf{c},\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction <em>opposite</em> of $\\mathbf{b}.$</p>\n<p>Finally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $-\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}\\mathbin{:}$ </p>\n<ul>\n<li><p>We can start $\\mathbf{-b}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane. </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Next, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{c}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{-b}.$ </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Now, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $-\\textbf{b}$ to the head of $\\textbf{c}$, as shown below. </p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-11749-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-e-0\" /></div> ",
          "explanation_text": "We interpret $-\\mathbf{b}+\\mathbf{c}$ as the addition\n\\[\n(-\\mathbf{b})+\\mathbf{c},\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction opposite of $\\mathbf{b}.$\nFinally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $-\\mathbf{b}$ and $\\mathbf{c}\\mathbin{:}$\nWe can start $\\mathbf{-b}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane.\nNext, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{c}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{-b}.$\nNow, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $-\\textbf{b}$ to the head of $\\textbf{c}$, as shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-2\" /> ",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-3\" /> ",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-4\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-5\" />",
              "text": ""
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-11749-a-1\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 469328,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};  \n\t\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (f) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 469327,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]   \n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (g) node[sloped, midway, above]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-a-5"
            },
            {
              "id": 469326,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]   \n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (f) -- (e) node[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 469325,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]   \n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{c}$};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (e) -- (f) node[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-a-3"
            },
            {
              "id": 469324,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]   \n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};  \n\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (f) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 469323,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]   \n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};  \n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (f) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 469322,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (5,3) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (5,1.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (c) node[midway ,above=2pt]{$\\mathbf{b}$ };\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,right]{$\\mathbf{c}$ };\n\t\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-11749"
            },
            {
              "id": 229144,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\usepackage{xcolor}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath, scale=2,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (2,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (1,4) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (1,2.5) {};\n\\coordinate (g) at (1,4) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (g) node[midway,above, xshift= 7, yshift=-3]{$\\mathbf{-b}$}; \n\\draw[fixstyle]  (e) -- (f) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{c}$};  \n\t\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (f) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{-b+c}$}; \n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "deda72f52f04ed8767aa5348bcf00bcd"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858362,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"
          }
        },
        {
          "number": 6,
          "question_id": 118284,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4359,
          "example_title": "Subtracting Two Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "M",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyModerate",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:00:06.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:00 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 32762,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:33",
          "result": "incorrect",
          "correct": false,
          "question_html": "<p>The diagram shows the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $\\mathbf{b}.$  Which of the following diagrams illustrates the vector subtraction $\\mathbf{a-b}.$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The diagram shows the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $\\mathbf{b}.$ Which of the following diagrams illustrates the vector subtraction $\\mathbf{a-b}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We interpret the subtraction\n$\n\\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}\n$\nas the addition\n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} + (-\\mathbf{b}),\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction <em>opposite</em> of $\\mathbf{b}.$</p>\n<p>Finally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $-\\mathbf{b}\\mathbin{:}$ </p>\n<ul>\n<li><p>We can start $\\mathbf{a}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane. </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Next, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{-b}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{a}.$ </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Now, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{a}$ to the head of $-\\textbf{b}$, as shown below.</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<div id=\"graphic-q-118284-e-0\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-e-0\" /></div>",
          "explanation_text": "We interpret the subtraction\n$\n\\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}\n$\nas the addition\n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} + (-\\mathbf{b}),\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction opposite of $\\mathbf{b}.$\nFinally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $-\\mathbf{b}\\mathbin{:}$\nWe can start $\\mathbf{a}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane.\nNext, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{-b}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{a}.$\nNow, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{a}$ to the head of $-\\textbf{b}$, as shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-2\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 3,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-3\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 4,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-4\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 5,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-5\" />",
              "text": ""
            }
          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 2,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118284-a-2\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 469648,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (4,3) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (5,3) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (5,1.5) {};\n\n\\draw[very thick, black, arrows={-latex}]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[very thick, black, arrows={-latex}]  (c) -- (d) node[midway,above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284"
            },
            {
              "id": 469654,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-e-0"
            },
            {
              "id": 469653,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (2,7) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (b) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (3,2) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-a-5"
            },
            {
              "id": 469652,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (2,7) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (b) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (c) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-a-4"
            },
            {
              "id": 469651,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (2,7) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (b) -- (c) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (c) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-a-3"
            },
            {
              "id": 469650,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (a) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-a-2"
            },
            {
              "id": 469649,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118284-a-1"
            },
            {
              "id": 227078,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfont=\\boldmath,\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (-1,2) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (-2,4) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-6,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.07cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "c4ce3f0c5ee222239ed5cb44622712a9"
            }
          ],
          "raw": {
            "answer_id": 12858381,
            "select_id": null,
            "question_format": "MC"

        },
        {
          "number": 7,
          "question_id": 118286,
          "task_id": 2828116,
          "task_type": "Lesson",
          "topic_id": 1100,
          "topic_name": "The Triangle Law for the Addition of Two Vectors",
          "example_id": 4359,
          "example_title": "Subtracting Two Vectors Using the Triangle Law",
          "format": "MC",
          "difficulty": "M",
          "difficulty_class": "difficultyModerate",
          "created_at": "2025-01-12T19:00:50.000Z",
          "created_display": "Sun, Jan 12th @ 7:00 PM",
          "time_elapsed_ms": 31710,
          "time_elapsed_display": "0:32",
          "result": "correct",
          "correct": true,
          "question_html": "<p>The diagram shows the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $\\mathbf{b}.$  Which of the following diagrams illustrates the vector subtraction $\\mathbf{a-b}.$</p>\n",
          "question_text": "The diagram shows the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $\\mathbf{b}.$ Which of the following diagrams illustrates the vector subtraction $\\mathbf{a-b}.$",
          "explanation_html": "<p>We interpret the subtraction\n$\n\\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}\n$\nas the addition\n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} + (-\\mathbf{b}),\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction <em>opposite</em> of $\\mathbf{b}.$</p>\n<p>Finally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $-\\mathbf{b}\\mathbin{:}$ </p>\n<ul>\n<li><p>We can start $\\mathbf{a}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane. </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Next, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{-b}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{a}.$ </p>\n</li>\n<li><p>Now, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{a}$ to the head of $-\\textbf{b}$, as shown below.</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<div id=\"graphic-f949f818d5eaff395cde89a60228acfb\" class=\"graphic\"><img src=\"/graphics/f949f818d5eaff395cde89a60228acfb\" /></div>\n",
          "explanation_text": "We interpret the subtraction\n$\n\\mathbf{a}-\\mathbf{b}\n$\nas the addition\n\\[\n\\mathbf{a} + (-\\mathbf{b}),\n\\]\nwhere $-\\mathbf{b}$ is the vector that has the same magnitude as $\\mathbf{b}$ but goes in the direction opposite of $\\mathbf{b}.$\nFinally, we use the triangle law to add the vectors $\\mathbf{a}$ and $-\\mathbf{b}\\mathbin{:}$\nWe can start $\\mathbf{a}$ from an arbitrary point on the plane.\nNext, we draw the vector that is equal to $\\mathbf{-b}$ and has its tail placed at the head of $\\mathbf{a}.$\nNow, according to the triangle law of addition, the resultant is the vector that goes from the tail of $\\textbf{a}$ to the head of $-\\textbf{b}$, as shown below.",
          "free_answer_choice_html": " ",
          "free_answer_choice_text": "",
          "choices": [
            {
              "number": 1,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118286-a-1\" />",
              "text": ""
            },
            {
              "number": 2,
              "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118286-a-2\" />",

          ],
          "student_answer": {
            "selected_choice": 1,
            "html": "<img src=\"/graphics/q-118286-a-1\" />",
            "text": "",
            "free_response": [],
            "raw_choices": null
          },
          "hints": [],
          "hint_status": "No hint field is exposed by the Math Academy completed-task review API.",
          "graphics": [
            {
              "id": 229115,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, above]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "f949f818d5eaff395cde89a60228acfb"
            },
            {
              "id": 469662,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (-2,0) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (-1,-4) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (5,3) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (5,1.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway,left]{$\\mathbf{b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118286"
            },
            {
              "id": 469663,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, above]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",
              "fileId": "q-118286-a-1"

            {
              "id": 469664,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (c) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (d) -- (a) node[sloped,midway, above]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469666,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (5,-7) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (d) -- (c) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469667,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (0,3) node[midway, left]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469668,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n    \n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (3,1) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, below left=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{-b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, above]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

            {
              "id": 469665,
              "tex": "\\documentclass{article}\n\\usepackage{pgfplots}\n\\usepackage{tikz}\n\\usetikzlibrary{shapes, calc, shapes, arrows, positioning}\n\\usetikzlibrary{decorations.markings, arrows.meta}\n\\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}\n\n\\begin{document}\n\\pagestyle{empty}\n\\definecolor{deepskyblue}{rgb}{0.173,0.447,0.682}\n\\definecolor{orangepeel}{rgb}{0.902, 0.624, 0}\n\\definecolor{lightyellow}{rgb}{0.953,0.882,0.388}\n\\definecolor{darkgreen}{rgb}{0.271, 0.608, 0.463}\n\\definecolor{lightblue}{rgb}{0.484,0.702,0.894}\n\\definecolor{rustred}{rgb}{0.784,0.392,0.149}\n\\definecolor{fadedpink}{rgb}{0.753,0.494,0.643}\n\\begin{tikzpicture}[\nfixstyle/.style={very thick, lightgray, shorten <= 1pt, shorten >= 1pt, arrows={-Latex[scale=1]}}\n]\n\n\\coordinate (a) at (0,0) {};\n\\coordinate (b) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (c) at (4,-3) {};\n\\coordinate (d) at (5,-7) {};\n\\coordinate (e) at (3,2) {};\n\\coordinate (f) at (3,0.5) {};\n\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (a) -- (b) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{a}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle]  (c) -- (d) node[midway, above right=-0.05cm]{$\\mathbf{b}$};\n\\draw[fixstyle, ultra thick, deepskyblue]  (a) -- (d) node[sloped,midway, below]{$\\mathbf{a-b}$};\n\n\\end{tikzpicture}\n\\end{document}",

          "raw": {
